item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval
item.description: Reminding ALL Varsity Track and Field Athletes today's practice takes place at Russell High School. Please make sure you wear layers, fill up your water bottle - gather as a group and walk over to meet Mr. and Mrs. Longval at the track. Attendance will be taken at 2:40pm and practice will go until 3:45pm Dismissal takes place at Russell high - so please make arrangements with parents

item.title: A message from Mme Perron:
item.description: There will be a Europe Team Meeting today at lunch in room 125 at 10:40 Am All travelers must attend!

item.title: A message from Ms. Montgomery:
item.description: The third and final varsity boys baseball tryout will be tomorrow night after school. See the TEAMS chat for details.

item.title: A message from Mr. D'Alessio:
item.description: The Drama Club is asked to meet in Rm.209 at 10:35 today, tomorrow, and Thursday.

item.title: A message from the Cafeteria:
item.description: The cafeteria will be closed on Friday, May 1st due to the BBQ Fundraiser for the Service Trip

item.title: A message from: Ms. Brennan.
item.description: Garden Club members are invited to participate in one of our last seedling transplant sessions today after school in room 201. Check our Teams page for more information.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval
item.description: Reminding all students interested in playing Co-Ed Ultimate are asked to attend a brief meeting TODAY at 10:45am in the weight room.

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: Thank you to everyone who participated in the service team bake sale, especially all our grade 7 friends who helped out so much. Please come to the chaplaincy office to pick up your containers today

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: Everyone who ordered candy grams to support rebuilding efforts in Jamaica, your candy grams will be delivered Thursday morning! Thank you for your support!
